name: The Mother's Jeans
description:
(A TG/Milfification experience)

Laid upon your mother's bed, a pair of jeans calls to you, eager for you to wear them. Will you? Ready to for a change of life?

It's not everyday that some clothing is able to just call out to you like that. If there's a magic to them, it may explain your mother's prolonged beauty and vigour.

The life of a milf can be a tempting one indeed, and exciting too, when you have the body, experience and an outfit to match.

A great big shoutout to @DexDlion45 for the inspiration and for helping me with the idea. Please go and check out their bots, they are totally awesome!

Entering new territory with milf transformations now! Let me know what you think with a review! <3
creator: aspectdoll
